title: Disable Bed Night Skipping
description: Disables beds skipping the night. Still allows players to set spawnpoints and sleep in the beds.
body:
Disables beds skipping the night. Still allows for players to set spawnpoints. Install on the server when using a multiplayer server, and install on the client for singleplayer.

# Features:
- Disable skipping the night with beds
- Works with multiplayer servers and singleplayer worlds
- Doesn't restrict any other vanilla bed functionality
- Still allows sleeping in beds and setting spawn points
